content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Part 2.

content.cn_text: 您将听到一家电子玩具公司经理向一小群新临时员工讲话
content.en_text: You will hear an electronic toy company manager talking to a small group of new temporary staff

content.cn_text: 他们将开始在公司工作。
content.en_text: who are starting work at the company.

content.cn_text: 首先，您有时间阅读问题11至15。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听并回答问题11至15。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 大家早上好，我叫珍妮特·帕克，是这家公司的人力资源经理。
content.en_text: Good morning everyone, my name's Janet Parker and I'm the Human Resources Manager of this company.

content.cn_text: 感谢大家加入我们并参加本次培训，我希望这能帮助大家
content.en_text: Thank you for joining us and come into this training session, which I hope will help you

content.cn_text: 快速了解我们公司并知道您在职位上将要做什么。
content.en_text: quickly learn about our company and know what you will do in your position.

content.cn_text: 首先，我将简要介绍我们公司的历史，我们是一家拥有30多年专业生产电动玩具历史的老公司。
content.en_text: First, I'll briefly introduce the history of our company, where quite an old company specialising in electric toys for more than 30 years.

content.cn_text: 创始人罗纳德·史蒂文森在完成学徒期后萌生了创办自己公司的想法。
content.en_text: The founder, Ronald Stevenson, got the idea of establishing his own company when he finished his apprenticeship.

content.cn_text: 在他的祖父支持下，他获得了足够的启动资金，公司在短时间内成立并取得了成功。
content.en_text: With the support of his grandfather, he got enough startup capital and the company was set up and succeeded in a short period.

content.cn_text: 为了满足客户需求，过去几年我们大大扩展了场地，员工人数也定期增长。
content.en_text: To satisfy the demands of customers, we've expanded the premises considerably over the past years and the number of staff members has grown up on a regular basis.

content.cn_text: 最近，我们发现产品销量增长非常缓慢，我们决定推出新的电子玩具来提振销量。
content.en_text: Recently, we found the sales of our products creeping up very slowly and we've decided to introduce new electronic toys to give that a boost.

content.cn_text: 所以我们不得不寻找更多工人来帮助我们，这就是你们在这里的原因。
content.en_text: So we have to look for more workers to help us and that's the reason why you are here.

content.cn_text: 第一周可能会相当有挑战性，因为会有很多新信息，但不用太担心要记住所有事情。
content.en_text: The first week may be pretty challenging as there will be a lot of new information but don't worry too much about trying to remember everything.

content.cn_text: 重要的是，如果您不确定该做什么，请向他人核实。
content.en_text: The important thing is to check with someone if you're unsure what to do.

content.cn_text: 根据合同，您将在这里工作六个月。
content.en_text: According to the contract, you'll be expected to work here for six months.

content.cn_text: 有些人问我是否有可能被聘为我们的全职员工。
content.en_text: Some of you asked me if there is a possibility for you to be employed as our full-time member.

content.cn_text: 我现在无法给出明确答复。这将取决于您在雇佣期间的工作表现以及届时我们是否有职位空缺。
content.en_text: I can't give you a definite answer now. It'll depend on your job performance during the employment and whether we have job vacancies then.

content.cn_text: 我们公司约有200名全职员工，其中70%负责货物配送，而少数职位在生产线上。
content.en_text: About 200 full-time staff members in our company, 70% of whom are responsible for sending out goods, while the minority of jobs are in the manufacturing line.

content.cn_text: 您将根据我们的需求在不同部门工作，我稍后会向您详细解释。
content.en_text: You will work in different departments according to our needs, which I'll explain to you in detail later.

content.cn_text: 在我们公司工作，您会为我们现代化的机械和生产方法、先进的技能以及友好的工作氛围所打动。
content.en_text: Working in our company, you'll be impressed by our modern machinery and production methods, advanced skills and friendly working atmosphere.

content.cn_text: 然而，我必须告诉您一件不太愉快的事情。因为薪资部门经理最近请病假，恐怕这个月您将无法按时收到工资。
content.en_text: However, I must tell you one thing which is not so pleasant. Because the manager of the payroll department is on sick leave these days, I'm afraid that you won't get paid on time this month.

content.cn_text: 但不用太担心。很快就会解决的。
content.en_text: But don't worry too much. It'll be solved very soon.

content.cn_text: 在您听余下的谈话之前，您有时间阅读问题16-20。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 16-20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题16-20。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 16-20.

content.cn_text: 在本次培训的第二部分，我将解释您在接下来的工作日中将负责什么。
content.en_text: In the second part of this training session, I'll explain what you will be responsible for in the following working days.

content.cn_text: 共有五个职位，您将在不同的部门工作。
content.en_text: There are five positions and you'll be working in different departments.

content.cn_text: 如前所述，我们急需有人能处理工资问题，以便我们的员工能尽快拿到工资。
content.en_text: As I've mentioned before, where in urgent need of someone who can deal with the salary problem, so our staff can get paid as soon as possible.

content.cn_text: 而这是第一个人的主要工作。然后，第二位将在生产线上工作，协助开发新产品。
content.en_text: And that's the primary job for the first person. Then, the second of you will be working in the manufacturing line to help develop new products.

content.cn_text: 第三名员工将在六楼工作，您的主要工作是负责机械方面。
content.en_text: The third person will work on the sixth floor and your main job is to look after the mechanical side.

content.cn_text: 这包括每天检查设备以确保它们正常运行，并在必要时进行一些维修工作。
content.en_text: It includes check in equipment daily to ensure they are working correctly and doing some repair work if necessary.

content.cn_text: 没有您的帮助，许多流程，如制造或包装，将无法顺利进行。
content.en_text: Without your help, many processes like manufacturing or packaging won't work well.

content.cn_text: 然后，第四名员工将在技术部门工作，处理与软件和硬件相关的问题。
content.en_text: Then, the fourth person will work in the technology department to deal with problems related to software and hardware.

content.cn_text: 我们下周将收到新的笔记本电脑，您必须安装新程序。
content.en_text: We're getting new laptops next week and you must install new programs.

content.cn_text: 最后一名员工将在售后服务部门工作。您需要与客户保持长期关系，包括定期收集反馈、处理客户投诉、提升客户满意度等。
content.en_text: And the last of you will work in the after sale service department. You are expected to keep a long term relationship with customers, including collecting feedback regularly, dealing with customer complaints, enhancing customer satisfaction, etc.

content.cn_text: 好的，今天我想分享的就是这些。大家有什么问题吗？
content.en_text: Okay, now that's all I want to share with you today. Are there any questions?

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。您现在有半分钟时间检查第二部分的答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of Part 2. You now have half a minute to check your answers to Part 2.

content.cn_text: 您
content.en_text: You

groups.desc: Choose the correct answer, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 11-15.

items.title: What point is made about the history of the company?

options.title: B
options.content: It took a long time to establish.

options.title: C
options.content: It was set up by a relative.

items.title: Why should the company recruit more temporary staff?

options.title: A
options.content: It plans to develop new products.

options.title: B
options.content: The old staff are having an illness.

options.title: C
options.content: It aims to meet the new demands of customers.

items.title: How long will the employees work in the company?
The largest number of positions are in the department of
What's the current problem with the company?

groups.desc: Choose FIVE answers from the box and write correct letter, A–F, next to Questions 16–20.
groups.title: Questions 16-20.
